component.name: MQTT Viewer
component.summary: Fast MQTT visualisation and debugging tool

description.p: MQTT Viewer is a fast, feature-rich desktop client for inspecting and debugging MQTT traffic. It stays responsive against busy public brokers and high-throughput connections.

ul.li: Connect to multiple brokers at once with a live topic tree
Inspect message history and payloads, including Protobuf and Sparkplug
Visualise topic structure as an interactive graph
Publish messages and export captured traffic
